pr.title: Record: 11L XSA + Mixed INT6 + Adaptive N-gram Cache (2->7 backoff) - val_bpb=0.9631, 3-seed

output.summary: 11-layer XSA GPT pairs mixed INT6 quantization with sliding-window eval and a score-first adaptive 2→7 n-gram cache.
techniques: XSA stack with tied embeddings plus EMA and late SWA averaging
Post-training mixed INT6 quantization with LZMA compression
Sliding-window inference enhanced by score-first adaptive 2→7 n-gram cache
